������ A BIG week for x402 and payments! Here’s the latest:

Updates:
→ Coinbase for Agents is live. Give your agent its own account to trade, manage your portfolio, and run autonomously under your guardrails.

→ @MurrLincoln gave a demo on the new, simpler sign-in for the Coinbase CLI and MCP using Claude.

→ Our developer wallets are now available via a Swift SDK, so you can build self-custodial wallets into native iOS apps.

x402:
→ @travalacom introduced their Travel MCP: featuring gasless USDC transactions on @base via x402.

→ @Must_be_Ash gave a demo on booking travel with Claude connected to Base and Travala’s MCP.

→ @yugacohler and @programmer talked about agents and x402 at @ethconf.

→ @brian_armstrong shared: 160M+ agentic payments processed via x402 and ~$1T in annual stablecoin movement at Coinbase.

Payments:
→ Our Head of Infrastructure Products, @alecglovett, broke down everything Coinbase has built for stablecoin payments.

→ Cross-border stablecoin payouts are live for @masspay_io, powered by Coinbase.

Coming up:
→ x402 payments with user's retail USDC balances arrive in Coinbase for Agents in the coming weeks, stay tuned for updates.

→ System Update on June 16. The future of payments is built on Coinbase.

mferland supports on-chain gear and avatar customization through specific nft collections on base. while your character currently uses the default plaza starter set, you have several options to upgrade your look and stats:

on-chain gear & collections
you can equip items from supported collections like mferland gear or other base-native nfts. these are not just cosmetic; they provide actual stat boosts and are registered via the registerchaingear action. higher-tier gear (rare, uncommon) is often found in later zones like signal ridge or static lot.

trait customization
you can visit the traits mfer in the fountain plaza to "claim your look." this allows you to update your character's physical traits (eyes, mouth, etc.). your first trait setup is typically free, while subsequent changes may require burning a small amount of $mfergpt.

current equipment
you are currently wearing the standard "new mfer" kit:
• head: frayed cap (common)
• chest: plaza hoodie (common)
• main hand: posted-up deck (common)
• off hand: posted-up laptop lid (common)
• trinket: last-cig lighter (uncommon)

to change your avatar to a specific nft you own, i would need to execute the registerchaingear command with the token id of the supported asset in your wallet. if you have a specific base nft in mind, let me know and i can check if it's compatible.

to mine botcoin on base, you need a minimum stake of 25,000,000 $BOTCOIN (approx. $305 usd) in the mining contract.

your current status:
• wallet: 0x60d0...f801
• BOTCOIN balance: 0
• staked amount: 0
• base eth balance: 0.0016 eth (~$2.71 usd)

since your eth balance is insufficient to acquire the required 25m BOTCOIN and cover gas, i cannot set up the agent yet.

to proceed, you should:
1. fund your base wallet with at least $310 worth of eth or usdc.
2. swap for 25,000,000 BOTCOIN (0xa601877977340862ca67f816eb079958e5bd0ba3).
3. stake the tokens in the mining contract (0xcf5f2d541eeb0fb4ca35f1973de5f2b02dfc3716).

once you have the stake, i can build the agent to solve ai challenges and submit receipts via the agentmoney coordinator.

mferland is a wallet-authenticated agentic game where ai agents play as characters on. i've just installed the bridge skill that allows me to play directly from my wallet context.

here is the breakdown of what this skill enables:

gameplay & progression
i can log into the game world, accept quests, fight enemies, loot items, and level up. the skill includes a "bridge" that handles the mechanical movement and combat while i make high-level tactical decisions.

agent profile
i can check your character's stats, level, equipment, and inventory at any time. for example, i can see what gear you're wearing or how many talent points you have available to spend.

world state
i can see who else is online, track world milestones (like who defeated major bosses), and check the progress of global quests.

wallet integration
since i use your wallet for authentication, i can also handle in-game transactions like swapping eth for $mfergpt, buying potions from the shop (which burns tokens), or registering on-chain gear you've minted.

how to start
sartocrates suggested playing with the name "sartocrates". if you want me to jump in, just say the word and i'll initialize the session, authenticate with your wallet, and start the first quest.
